summary: Integrated ADR 0235 on synchronized main release 0.177.70 by replaying the exact-main interactive ops portal from the merged worktree, preserving the PatternFly-style cross-application launcher, session-scoped favorites, and the authenticated public-edge contract on top of the 0.130.47 baseline and establishing platform version 0.130.48 after end-to-end verification.

verification.check: Protected release cut from refreshed mainline
verification.observed: `git fetch origin main --prune` confirmed the integration worktree still matched `origin/main` commit `414c0b27f424a95bba790963d59cd7a7442ab833`; `scripts/release_manager.py --dry-run` then reported `Current version: 0.177.69`, `Next version: 0.177.70`, and `Unreleased notes: 1`; and the protected release cut prepared repository version `0.177.70` with platform-impact text that advances the live baseline to `0.130.48` after the exact-main replay.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=ops_portal env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true -e ops_portal_repo_root=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0235-main-merge-r3'` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=129 changed=15 failed=0 skipped=14`, and the run passed both `Verify the application launcher partial renders locally` and `Assert the application launcher is present` from the hardened runtime replay.

verification.check: Launcher endpoint, session, and public-edge proof
verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0235-mainline-internal-endpoints.txt` recorded `/health`, `/`, `/partials/overview`, and `/partials/launcher` all returning `200`; `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0235-mainline-launcher-session-check.txt` recorded `favorite_response_remove_keycloak=2`, `after_remove_keycloak=3`, `after_recents_section=1`, and `redirect_code=303` with `redirect_location=https://sso.lv3.org`; and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0235-mainline-public-edge-check.txt` confirmed `https://ops.lv3.org/health -> 200 {"status":"ok"}` while `https://ops.lv3.org/` preserved the expected oauth sign-in redirect.

verification.check: Deployed runtime hash and route proof
verification.observed: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-29-adr-0235-mainline-live-hashes.txt` captured `/app/ops_portal/app.py` at `a3330585cae1c40bbaf005ff3398c700e1896f4e6f8a808dc20979e03104ec51`, `/app/ops_portal/runtime_assurance.py` at `ae1f8ee31f508cae618b8e8b272cb6727645db4fab46a52948ae2ea8192d14d2`, `/app/search_fabric/__init__.py` at `d9094470c32e2f93c71ba5b3eb4f2df7737186ec4e9299adb660a83e0194e904`, and route proof for `/partials/launcher`, `/actions/launcher/favorites/{item_id}`, `/actions/launcher/persona/{persona_id}`, and `/launcher/go/{item_id}` from the running container.

verification.check: Integrated repo automation and validation slice
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with fastapi==0.116.1 --with httpx==0.28.1 --with cryptography==45.0.6 --with PyJWT==2.10.1 --with jinja2==3.1.5 --with itsdangerous==2.2.0 --with python-multipart==0.0.20 pytest tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py tests/test_ops_portal_runtime_role.py tests/test_ops_portal.py tests/test_runtime_assurance_scoreboard.py -q` returned `31 passed in 8.20s`; `make syntax-check-ops-portal` passed; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` passed; `make validate-data-models` passed after removing a temporary ws-0235 ownership-manifest receipt-path duplication; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-docs` passed; `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-portals` passed; `uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/canonical_truth.py --check` passed; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/platform_manifest.py --check` passed; `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check` passed; `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate` reported `Live apply receipts OK`; and `git diff --check` passed.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces` was exercised and failed with `branch 'codex/ws-0235-main-merge-r3' maps to terminal workstream 'ws-0235-main-merge'`. That validator intentionally rejects terminal workstreams on non-`main` branches, so this result documents expected branch-local behavior rather than a defect in the ws-0235 merged surfaces.

notes: The isolated-worktree receipt `2026-03-29-adr-0235-cross-application-launcher-live-apply` remains the first-live proof for ADR 0235. This mainline receipt becomes the canonical evidence for integrated release `0.177.70` and platform version `0.130.48`.
This replay again used `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` as the documented ADR 0191 narrow exception because `ops_portal` still declares immutable guest replacement on `docker-runtime-lv3`.

The initial metadata refresh introduced a temporary workstream ownership duplication for the ws-0235 receipt paths. That repo-only defect was corrected before the final validation rerun and did not affect the live platform state or the exact-main portal replay.

The only validation-path result that remained non-pass on this worktree was the expected `workstream-surfaces` terminal-branch guard, which should be interpreted in the context of running the validator from `codex/ws-0235-main-merge-r3` instead of `main`.
